tests.description: Comma-separated list of refolding tests to perform. Available tests: TODO

input_designs.description: Input PDB file(s) of designs to be evaluated, a folder of PDB files (ending with /) or .txt file containing multiple PDB paths (one per line)

native_pdb.description: PDB file with original (native) structure(s) of the designs to be used for native motif RMSD calculation

input_references.description: Input directory containing reference PDB files that can be used for example as structure templates

batch_size.description: Number of designs to evaluate in one batch (each batch can run in parallel)
